g.text: Existing distributed MPC + explicit hybrid safety supervisor
Python process controls MATLAB session · workspace variable exchange · sim() command dispatch
Fixed-step solver (dt = 0.01 s) · 4 independent agent subsystems · N planning steps × M inner steps
To Workspace: x, y, θ, v, ω (odometry)
To Workspace: x, y, θ, v, ω (odometry)
Identical structure to agents 1–2: From/To Workspace, motion controller, unicycle integrator
v_ref = ‖[u_x, u_y]‖ θ_ref = atan2(u_y, u_x) e_θ = wrap(θ_ref − θ)
ω = k_ω · e_θ (heading P-ctrl) v = v_ref · max(cos e_θ, 0) (speed shaping)
